spell_resistance.value: yes (see text) successfully resists this spell, it is unaffected by the winds and sand, but still unable to see within the area of the spell. description.value: This spell brings forth a windstorm of stinging sand that blocks all vision. You can move the storm up to 30 feet each round as a move action.
